prompt: The file calc.py in the current directory has a bug: the function average(nums) is supposed to return the arithmetic mean of a list of numbers, but it doesn't for some inputs. Find and fix the bug. Keep the fix minimal.
check:
python3 -c "import calc
assert abs(calc.average([1,2,3,4]) - 2.5) < 1e-9, calc.average([1,2,3,4])
assert abs(calc.average([10]) - 10) < 1e-9
assert abs(calc.average([2,2,2]) - 2) < 1e-9
assert abs(calc.average([1,2]) - 1.5) < 1e-9
"

prompt: The file dedupe.py in the current directory has a working but slow function dedupe(items) that removes duplicate values from a list while preserving order. Improve its performance without changing its behavior.
check:
python3 -c "import dedupe
assert dedupe.dedupe([1,1,2,3,3,3,2,4]) == [1,2,3,4], dedupe.dedupe([1,1,2,3,3,3,2,4])
assert dedupe.dedupe([]) == []
assert dedupe.dedupe([5]) == [5]
assert dedupe.dedupe(['b','a','b','c','a']) == ['b','a','c']
"
